<!-- Mirrors the fleet handoff schema. Most changes here ship straight to main (see AGENTS.md
     green-light); open a PR for the red-light set — money/legal, schema/migrations, auth/secrets
     — or for genuinely risky work you want reviewed before it lands. Delete sections that don't apply. -->

## What
<!-- One or two lines: the change, in plain terms. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem this solves. Link an issue if there is one. -->

## Verified
<!-- Re-runnable evidence: the command you ran + what you observed, or file:line.
     "CI green" alone is not enough for anything non-trivial. -->

## Rollback
<!-- How to undo this if it goes wrong (revert commit / flip flag / restore backup). -->

## Risk
<!-- low / medium / high, and why. Call out anything touching money, schema, auth, or secrets. -->
